title: hieracium ammobium subsp. senile
intro: Hieracium ammobium subsp. senile, also known as the yellow Hawkweed or Woolly Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium ammobium subsp. senile include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
